cards.title: WWDC 2026: Apple Intelligence and Siri Overhaul
cards.body: Apple unveiled major improvements to Siri AI and introduced Apple Intelligence across iOS 27. The keynote focused on AI as one part of broader software improvements rather than a standalone feature.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5 Publicly
cards.body: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the general public. The model includes safety guardrails blocking high-risk responses in cybersecurity and biology.

cards.title: Tech Industry Shifts to MANGOS Acronym
cards.body: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI are preparing massive public debuts, potentially reshaping the tech industry's power structure. The new MANGOS acronym may replace FAANG as the defining corporate classification.

cards.title: Sandstone Raises $30M for Legal AI
cards.body: Sandstone closed a Series A funding round six months after its Sequoia-led seed round. The company brings AI capabilities to in-house legal teams.

cards.title: Lovable Hits $500M Annualized Revenue
cards.body: Lovable surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue with users building 1 million new projects weekly. The platform is replacing internal software for businesses worldwide.

cards.title: Orbital Raises $5M for Space Data Centers
cards.body: Euwyn Poon, former Spin e-scooter founder, launched Orbital to deploy 10,000 space-based data centers. He previously scaled production to 250,000 scooters.

cards.title: Apple's Measured AI Strategy Gaining Ground
cards.body: Apple's incremental AI approach at WWDC may counter accusations of losing the industry race. The company positioned AI as enhancing existing features rather than dominating the narrative.

cards.title: Mercor Accuses Sequoia of Dual-Pricing
cards.body: Mercor's Brendan Foody called out Sequoia for selling identical equity at different valuations. Top-tier VCs reportedly use this practice regularly.

cards.title: Tools for Humanity Struggles, Lays Off Staff
cards.body: Sam Altman's identity verification company is reportedly downsizing amid revenue generation challenges. The layoffs coincide with OpenAI's IPO filing.

cards.title: OpenAI Files Confidentially for IPO
cards.body: OpenAI filed for a confidential IPO following Anthropic's similar move a week earlier. The filings signal an intensifying competitive race between the two AI giants.

cards.title: Apple Plays Catch-Up on AI Features
cards.body: Apple's WWDC keynote emphasized fixes and long-requested features before unveiling upgraded Siri AI. The company positioned AI as enhancing core user experiences rather than leading innovation.

cards.title: Apple Waives Cloud API Costs for Developers
cards.body: Apple is lowering barriers for small developers by eliminating cloud API costs for apps with under 2 million downloads. The move addresses rising AI experimentation costs in the ecosystem.

cards.title: iPhone Now Completes Sentences and Workflows
cards.body: Apple integrated AI-powered features across Safari, Shortcuts, and Password apps for enhanced productivity. Users can now automate tasks and generate content with natural language prompts.

cards.title: Shortcuts App Gets AI Workflow Builder
cards.body: Apple's Shortcuts app now lets users describe desired workflows in plain language for AI generation. The feature simplifies automation for non-technical users.

cards.title: Image Playground Gets Major Makeover
cards.body: Apple's AI image generator received significant improvements to enhance competitiveness. The updated tool now delivers higher-quality results for creative users.

cards.title: Photos App Gains AI Editing Capabilities
cards.body: Apple's Photos app introduces a spatial 'Reframe' feature powered by AI for perspective adjustment. Users can now edit compositions automatically.

cards.title: Siri Gets Its Own Dedicated App
cards.body: Apple finally launched a standalone Siri app alongside iOS 27. The dedicated application enhances accessibility and features for the assistant.

cards.title: Siri Camera Feature Simplifies Bill Splitting
cards.body: Point your iPhone at a restaurant bill and select your items to split costs via Apple Cash. The new camera feature streamlines expense sharing with friends.

cards.title: Siri AI Transforms into Intelligent Companion
cards.body: Apple's upgraded Siri evolves from voice-controlled assistant to a true AI companion with expanded capabilities. The redesigned assistant can now handle complex tasks and contextual understanding.

cards.title: WWDC 2026: Apple Intelligence and Siri AI
cards.body: Apple unveiled a significantly improved Siri assistant with AI capabilities at WWDC 2026. The company positioned AI as one part of a broader effort to enhance its software experience.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5 Model
cards.body: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class AI model available to the public. The model includes guardrails blocking high-risk responses in cybersecurity and biology.

cards.title: OpenAI Files for IPO Confidentially
cards.body: OpenAI filed confidentially for an IPO following Anthropic's public filing. The move intensifies competition between the two leading AI firms.

cards.title: Anthropic Files for IPO, Leading AI Race
cards.body: Anthropic filed to go public, ramping up competition with OpenAI. The filing marks a major milestone for the AI industry.

cards.title: Apple Waives Cloud API Costs for Developers
cards.body: As AI experimentation becomes more expensive, Apple is eliminating cloud API costs for developers with fewer than 2 million first-time App Store downloads. The move aims to democratize AI access.

cards.title: Apple's Shortcuts App Gets AI Upgrade
cards.body: Apple enhanced its Shortcuts app with AI, allowing users to describe workflows in natural language prompts. The app now handles AI-powered automation for iPhone and Mac users.

cards.title: Apple's Image Playground Gets Major Makeover
cards.body: Apple's AI image generator received significant improvements to boost competitiveness. The upgraded tool aims to rival other generative AI image platforms.

cards.title: Apple Photos App Adds AI Editing Features
cards.body: Apple introduced a spatial "Reframe" feature powered by AI for photo editing. Users can now adjust perspectives automatically using machine learning.

cards.title: Siri Gets Dedicated App in iOS 27
cards.body: Apple finally gave Siri its own standalone application. The dedicated app reflects the assistant's evolution into a more capable AI companion.

cards.title: Apple's Siri AI Overhaul Arrives
cards.body: Apple transformed Siri from a voice-controlled assistant into a true AI companion with expanded capabilities. The new "Siri AI" can handle significantly more complex tasks.

cards.title: Leading in Hybrid Human-AI Workforce
cards.body: AI agent adoption is projected to surge up to 300% in the next two years. Leadership teams are evaluating implications of autonomous AI agents in enterprise settings.

cards.title: Five Key Themes in AI Right Now
cards.body: MIT Technology Review highlighted the biggest current themes in artificial intelligence. The analysis covers emerging trends shaping the AI industry.

cards.title: Meta Hack Reveals AI Security Gaps
cards.body: Attackers exploited Meta's AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. The incident demonstrates vulnerabilities beyond frontier AI model security.

cards.title: AI Chatbots Impact on Cognitive Control
cards.body: Research shows AI chatbots may affect users' cognitive control and brain function. Psychologists are studying long-term implications of AI assistant dependency.

cards.title: Courts Cope with AI-Generated Lawsuits Flood
cards.body: Federal judges face increasing challenges from AI-generated legal filings. Courts are developing protocols to handle the surge of machine-generated litigation.

cards.title: Apple's Siri AI Now More Conversational
cards.body: Apple announced an upgraded "Siri AI" with enhanced conversational abilities. The new assistant marks a significant step forward in voice AI technology.

cards.title: Gemini 3.5 Comes to NotebookLM
cards.body: Google integrated Gemini 3.5 and Antigravity into NotebookLM. The update enhances AI capabilities for research and note-taking workflows.

cards.title: Apple Claims Privacy Despite Google Servers
cards.body: Apple asserts its AI remains private even when running on Google Cloud servers. The company emphasized privacy protections in its hybrid cloud architecture.

cards.title: Sandstone Raises $30M for AI Legal Tech
cards.body: Sandstone secured $30 million in Series A funding to bring AI to in-house legal teams. The funding came just six months after a Sequoia-led seed round.

cards.title: Lovable Hits $500M Annualized Revenue
cards.body: Lovable announced $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue with 1 million new AI projects weekly. Users are building businesses and replacing internal software with the platform.
